backend/main.mo: Motoko actor defining the backend for an educational platform with storage and CRUD operations for Notes, Papers, and Tools, including filtering and sorting utilities.
feature_evidence.json: Feature evidence report mapping four branding-fix features (replacing 'EduNex Aisa' with 'EduNex AI') to their affected frontend files and test IDs.
frontend-file-summaries.txt: JSON document containing one-line summaries for each frontend source file, serving as a reference index for the project's frontend structure.
frontend/index.css: Global Tailwind CSS file defining OKLCH-based design tokens for light and dark modes, including background, foreground, primary, accent, and chart color variables.
frontend/index.html: Minimal HTML entry point that sets the page title to 'EduNex AI' and mounts the React app via the root div and main.tsx module script.
frontend/src/App.tsx: Root React component that configures TanStack Router with five routes (/, /ai-assistant, /notes, /pyq, /tools) and wraps them in a shared layout with Navbar, Footer, and Toaster.
frontend/src/components/Footer.tsx: Footer component displaying the 'EduNex AI' brand, quick navigation links, a mission statement, copyright notice, and a caffeine.ai attribution link.
frontend/src/components/Navbar.tsx: Sticky responsive navbar with the 'EduNex AI' logo, five navigation links with active-state highlighting, a 'Study Now' CTA button, and a mobile hamburger menu.
frontend/src/components/NoteForm.tsx: A dialog form component for creating new notes, collecting title, content, subject, class/grade, and education level fields, then submitting via the useCreateNote mutation hook.
frontend/src/components/PaperForm.tsx: A dialog form component for adding new exam papers (PYQ or sample), collecting title, type, subject, class/grade, year, and file URL, then submitting via the useAddPaper mutation hook.
frontend/src/hooks/useActor.ts: A custom hook that creates and caches an ICP backend actor (authenticated or anonymous) using React Query, and invalidates dependent queries whenever the actor changes.
frontend/src/hooks/useInternetIdentity.t: Provides an InternetIdentityProvider and useInternetIdentity hook for managing DFINITY Internet Identity authentication state, including login, logout, and identity persistence via AuthClient.
frontend/src/hooks/useQueries.ts: Defines React Query hooks for fetching and mutating notes, papers, and tools against the ICP backend actor, covering CRUD operations and cache invalidation.
frontend/src/index.css: Global stylesheet that imports fonts, sets up Tailwind directives, and defines CSS custom properties for the design system's color tokens in both light and dark modes, plus utility gradient classes.
frontend/src/main.tsx: Application entry point that mounts the React app wrapped with QueryClientProvider and InternetIdentityProvider into the DOM root.
frontend/src/pages/AIAssistant.tsx: Chat interface page for an AI study assistant that renders a conversation thread and returns mock subject-specific responses (math, physics, chemistry, history, etc.) based on keyword matching in the user's input.
frontend/src/pages/Home.tsx: Landing page that displays a hero section, stats bar, and feature cards linking to the AI Assistant, Notes Library, PYQ Papers, and Academic Tools sections of the app.
frontend/src/pages/Notes.tsx: Notes library page that fetches all notes via a React Query hook, supports search and filtering by level/subject, and allows adding new notes through a NoteForm component.
frontend/src/pages/PYQ.tsx: Previous Year Questions and sample papers page that fetches papers, supports filtering by type/year/subject/search, and lets users add new papers via a PaperForm component.
frontend/src/pages/Tools.tsx: Academic tools listing page that fetches available tools, auto-initializes them if none exist, and renders each as a card with a launch link or 'Coming Soon' state.
frontend/tailwind.config.js: Tailwind CSS configuration for the EduNex AI frontend, defining dark mode, custom color palettes (teal, amber, semantic tokens via oklch), typography, border radius, box shadows, and animation keyframes using typography, container-queries, and animate plugins.
project_state.json: Project state manifest for EduNex AI (version 5) describing the app's features, architectural notes, and existing implemented features including the visual theme, navigation, AI study assistant, notes, PYQ/sample papers, and academic tools sections.
